items.text:
LAUNDRY ROOM RENOVATION NOTICE
Effective Dates: Monday, June 16 through Friday, July 11
Location: Westbrook Residence Hall, Basement Level

The laundry room in Westbrook Residence Hall will be closed for a complete renovation starting Monday, June 16, at 7:00 AM. During this four-week period, all washers and dryers will be replaced with new energy-efficient units. The room will reopen on Saturday, July 12, at 9:00 AM.

Residents may use the following alternative locations during the closure:
• Eastgate Hall Laundry Room (4-minute walk)
• Pine Court Laundry Annex (open 24 hours)
• Northway Apartments Shared Facility

Please note the following during the renovation period:
• A $5 temporary access pass to Northway is available at the Front Desk
• Carts will be available outside Westbrook for transporting laundry
• Lost or abandoned items left in the closed room will be donated after June 14

For questions, contact the Housing Office at 555-3120 or visit Room 110 in Westbrook between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM on weekdays.

questions.stem: According to the notice, when will the renovated laundry room reopen?
questions.explanation: The notice states the room will reopen on Saturday, July 12, at 9:00 AM.

questions.stem: What must residents do to access the Northway facility?

options.B: Bring their student ID to Pine Court
options.C: Wait until July 12 for new access cards
options.D: Purchase a $5 access pass at the Front Desk

questions.explanation: The notice indicates a $5 temporary access pass to Northway is available at the Front Desk.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about laundry items left in Westbrook after June 14?

options.A: They will be moved to Eastgate Hall storage
options.B: They will be returned to owners by mail
options.C: They will no longer be available for owners to reclaim
options.D: They will remain in the closed room until July 12

questions.explanation: The notice says lost or abandoned items will be donated after June 14, meaning owners can no longer recover them.

items.text:
RECREATION CENTER POLICY UPDATE
Effective Date: Monday, September 9
Location: Harrison Recreation Center

The Harrison Recreation Center will implement the following updated facility policies beginning Monday, September 9. These changes are being introduced to improve member safety and equipment availability during peak hours.

Updated Hours and Access:
• Weekday hours extended to 5:30 AM through 11:30 PM
• Saturday hours reduced to 8:00 AM through 8:00 PM
• Sunday hours unchanged at 10:00 AM through 6:00 PM

New Policies:
• Cardio equipment is now subject to a 30-minute time limit when others are waiting
• A $10 day-pass option is available for non-member campus visitors
• Lockers must be cleared daily; padlocks left overnight will be cut by staff
• Reservations for racquetball courts open at 6:00 AM each morning

Members who wish to review the full policy document may pick up a printed copy at the Welcome Desk or download it from the Recreation Center website. For questions, please contact Member Services at 555-7745 weekdays between 9:00 AM and 4:00 PM.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what change is being made to Saturday hours?

options.A: Saturday hours are shortened to 8:00 AM through 8:00 PM
options.B: Saturday hours are extended to 5:30 AM through 11:30 PM
options.C: Saturday hours are unchanged from the previous schedule
options.D: Saturday hours are limited to members only

questions.explanation: The notice indicates Saturday hours are reduced to 8:00 AM through 8:00 PM.

questions.stem: What happens to padlocks left on lockers overnight?

options.A: Lockers are reassigned to other members
options.B: Padlocks are removed by recreation center staff
options.C: Owners receive a written warning by mail
options.D: Items inside are donated to local charities

questions.explanation: The notice states padlocks left overnight will be cut by staff.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the timing of racquetball court reservations?

options.A: Reservations are no longer accepted under the new policy
options.B: Early risers have the best chance to reserve a court
options.C: Reservations are only available to members who pay extra
options.D: Saturday courts cannot be reserved at all

questions.explanation: Since reservations open at 6:00 AM each morning, members who book early can claim preferred times.
